summary: The suite covers core cleanup logic well (policies, formatting, JSON parsing) but has critical gaps: (1) cli.ts is untested—no tests for argument parsing, file I/O, or error handling; (2) act-harness tests only 2 fixture cases, missing single-policy scenarios and error paths; (3) edge cases are sparse (date boundaries, zero/empty sets, conflicting policies, invalid dates in artifacts, unsigned integers). cleanup.test.ts is readable and deterministic, but CLI remains a black box. The act-harness is optional (RUN_ACT_HARNESS=1), potentially violating the task requirement that all tests run through the pipeline. Test design is sound but coverage is insufficient to catch regressions across the full implementation.
